data.task_objective: Generate the final evaluation report combining job requirements, resume summary, and scored responses, and compile a .txt file documenting all steps taken throughout the process.
data.context:
Task task0:
  Objective: Parse the job description and extract key requirements and competencies.
  Result: Job Title: Interviewer/Assessor
Seniority Level: Not specified
Department: Human Resources/Talent Acquisition
Employment Type: Not specified
Location / Remote Policy: Not specified

Required Skills:
- Job description analysis
- Resume analysis
- Technical interviewing
- Email communication
- Candidate evaluation
- Report generation

Preferred Skills: Not specified

Required Experience: Not specified
Educational Requirements: Not specified

Key Responsibilities:
- Analyze job descriptions to identify requirements and competencies
- Analyze candidate resumes to assess qualifications
- Conduct technical interviews to evaluate candidate skills
- Communicate with candidates and stakeholders via email
- Score candidate responses and provide feedback
- Generate final evaluation reports summarizing candidate performance

Compensation Range: Not specified

Flags / Notes:
- Several fields (seniority level, location, employment type, compensation, education) were not specified.

Task task1:
  Objective: Parse the candidate resume and summarize relevant experience and skills.
  Result: Candidate Name: Jane Doe

Summary of Relevant Experience and Skills:

1. Professional Experience
   - Software Engineer at TechCorp (2018–Present)
     • Designed and implemented microservices in Java and Spring Boot, serving 2 million+ users.
     • Developed RESTful APIs and integrated third-party services (Stripe, Twilio).
     • Led migration of legacy monolith to Docker-based containers on AWS ECS, reducing deployment time by 70%.
   - Junior Developer at WebSolutions Inc. (2016–2018)
     • Built customer-facing web applications using React.js and Node.js.
     • Optimized database queries in PostgreSQL, improving page-load times by 30%.
     • Collaborated in agile teams, participated in code reviews and sprint planning.

2. Technical Skills
   - Programming Languages: Java, Python, JavaScript (ES6+)
   - Frameworks & Libraries: Spring Boot, React.js, Node.js, Express
   - Cloud & DevOps: AWS (EC2, ECS, S3, Lambda), Docker, Jenkins, Terraform
   - Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis
   - Tools: Git, Jira, Confluence, Postman

3. Education
   - B.Sc. in Computer Science, University of State (2012–2016)
     • Coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms, Distributed Systems, Database Design

4. Certifications
   - AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate
   - Oracle Certified Professional, Java SE 11 Developer

5. Key Soft Skills
   - Strong problem-solving and analytical abilities
   - Excellent communication and teamwork in cross-functional environments
   - Proven leadership in mentoring junior engineers and coordinating releases

6. Notable Achievements
   - Recipient of “Innovator Award” at TechCorp for leading performance-optimization initiative.
   - Open-source contributor to several widely used Java libraries.

data.next_objective:
Task task7:
  Objective: Send the final evaluation and feedback email to stakeholders/candidate.
data.result:
```text
1. Analyze the job description:
   - Extracted key requirements and competencies for the Interviewer/Assessor role.
   - Identified required skills: job description analysis, resume analysis, technical interviewing, email communication, candidate evaluation, and report generation.

2. Analyze the candidate resume:
   - Summarized Jane Doe's relevant experience and skills.
   - Highlighted experience as a Software Engineer at TechCorp and Junior Developer at WebSolutions Inc.
   - Noted technical skills: Java, Python, JavaScript, Spring Boot, React.js, Node.js, AWS, Docker, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis.
   - Recorded education, certifications, soft skills, and notable achievements.

3. Conduct technical interview:
   - Asked questions to evaluate the candidate's technical skills and experience.
   - Included questions on microservices architecture, AWS ECS vs. Kubernetes, API optimization, database selection, TDD, debugging production issues, and RESTful API design.
   - Asked follow-up questions based on the candidate's responses.

4. Send emails as and when needed:
   - Send confirmation email for interview.
   - Send follow-up emails to the candidate and stakeholders.

5. Score candidate responses:
   - Scored each interview question based on the candidate's response.
   - Provided rationale for each score, including summaries of the responses and any red flags.

6. Generate final evaluation report:
   - Combined job requirements, resume summary, and scored responses.
   - Calculated an overall score and provided a recommendation.
   - Included interviewer notes on the candidate's performance, soft skills, and cultural fit.
```
